raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Ochoa Bogh advocated for $1,500,000 in funding to support the County of San Bernardino's acquisition of front loader and skid steer snow blowers.",
    "This investment will significantly improve snow removal operations, ensuring safer and more accessible roads during winter storms.",
    "The enhanced mobility and increased safety will positively impact the lives of residents and businesses in the Inland Empire.",
    "Senator Ochoa Bogh secured $2,500,000 in funding for the planning and design costs of Children and Youth Services facilities at the Riverside University Health System.",
    "This allocation will enable the creation of state-of-the-art facilities that cater to the specific needs of children and youth in the Inland Empire."
  ]
}
```
